errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests from your network. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
errors.serviceUnavailable: We're having a hiccup on our side. Please try again in a moment.

meta.title: Your Persona's — Free MBTI & GRIT Personality Test
meta.description: Find your MBTI type, measure your GRIT, and get an AI-written personality summary — free, 15 minutes, no account needed.

hero.subtitle: Answer honest questions, meet your MBTI mascot, see your GRIT level, and get a personal AI-written summary about you — not a horoscope.
hero.trust: No credit card. No spam. Your essay stays private.

how.title: Three steps to the real you
how.subtitle: No sign-up needed to start — your result is ready in one sitting.

one.title: Tell us a little about you
one.desc: Just a name, your age, and what you're up to these days. 30 seconds, promise.

two.title: Answer honestly
two.desc: Scenario questions, quick scales, and one short guided reflection. No wrong answers — the honest one is the right one.

three.title: Meet your persona
three.desc: Your MBTI mascot, GRIT level, and an AI-written summary that actually reads like it knows you. Share it or save it as a PDF.

mbti.title: Your MBTI type + mascot
mbti.desc: One of 16 types, each with its own collectible mascot character in two styles.

grit.title: GRIT score with meaning
grit.desc: Not just a number — see whether your perseverance is Low, Medium, or High and what that means.

summary.title: A summary about you
summary.desc: AI reads your reflection and writes 2–4 paragraphs about how you tick. Every result is unique.

share.title: Made to be shared
share.desc: A share-ready result card for your stories, plus a PDF report you can keep.

finalCta.title: 15 minutes from now, you'll know.
finalCta.subtitle: Free while in early access — take the test before your quota resets tomorrow-you's excuses.

footer.privacy: Your essay answers are used only to generate your result and are never shared. Guest results auto-expire after 14 days.

onboarding.title: First, a quick intro
onboarding.subtitle: This helps your result speak to you — not a generic template.

displayName.label: What should we call you?
displayName.help: Shows up on your result card and PDF.

age.label: Your age
age.help: The way questions are phrased adapts a little to life stage.

status.label: What are you up to these days?

consent.label: I'm 13 or older, and I agree my answers are processed to generate my result.
consent.privacy: Privacy in one line: your essay is only used to build your result, guest data auto-deletes after 14 days, and nothing is ever sold.

errors.displayNameRequired: We need something to call you.
errors.ageMin: You need to be at least 13 to take the test.
errors.statusRequired: Pick the one that fits best.
errors.consentRequired: We can't start without your consent.

onboarding.rateLimited: Too many new sessions from your network. Try again in {seconds} seconds.

a.title: Section A — What would you do?
a.intro: Everyday scenarios. Pick the option closest to what you'd actually do — there are no wrong answers.

b.title: Section B — How much is this you?
b.intro: Rate how much each statement fits you, from strongly disagree to strongly agree. Go with your gut.

c.title: Section C — Tell your story
c.intro: Two short guided prompts. A few honest sentences are enough — this is what makes your result feel personal.

essay.guardrail: No need to overshare — a short story about what happened, what you did, and how it turned out is perfect.
essay.placeholder: Write a few sentences from your own experience...
essay.counterStart: {words} words — keep going, you're doing great
essay.counterOk: {words} words — nice, that's enough (more is welcome!)

waiting.title: Reading your story...

lines.0: Matching your answers against 16 personality patterns...
lines.1: Your essays are getting a close read...

waiting.note: This usually takes a few seconds. Don't close this page.

quota.title: You've used this month's test
quota.descGuest: Guests get 1 free test per month. Create a free account and get 3 tests every month — plus your results are saved forever.
quota.descMember: You've used all 3 tests for this month. Your quota resets at the start of next month.

errors.incomplete: A few questions are still unanswered — scroll up to finish them.
errors.essayTooShort: Give each story at least {min} characters so we can read you properly.
errors.rateLimited: Too many submissions from your network. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
errors.noSession: Your session wasn't found. Start from the beginning so we can set you up.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to see your dashboard, quota, and past results.

errors.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like an email.
errors.emailNotVerified: Your email isn't verified yet. Check your inbox for the OTP code.
errors.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts — your account is locked for about 15 minutes.
errors.turnstileFailed: Bot check failed. Please complete the challenge again.
errors.turnstileRequired: Please complete the bot check first.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Free forever — 3 tests every month, results saved permanently.

password.label: Password
password.help: Minimum 10 characters. We check it against known breach databases.

errors.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like an email.
errors.passwordBreached: This password appears in a known data breach — pick a different one.
errors.emailTaken: This email is already registered. Try logging in instead.
errors.turnstileFailed: Bot check failed. Please complete the challenge again.
errors.turnstileRequired: Please complete the bot check first.

verify.title: Check your inbox
verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email.
verify.missingEmail: No email to verify. Start from the register page.

errors.invalidOtpWithAttempts: That code isn't right. {attempts} attempts left.
errors.otpExpired: This code has expired — request a new one.
errors.otpMaxAttempts: Too many wrong attempts. Request a new code.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Three quick steps: email, code, new password.

newPassword.label: New password
newPassword.help: Minimum 10 characters, checked against breach databases.

email.desc: Enter your email — if it's registered, we'll send a reset code.

otp.desc: If {email} is registered, a 6-digit code is on its way.

password.desc: Set your new password. All other devices will be logged out.

errors.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like an email.
errors.turnstileRequired: Please complete the bot check first.
errors.turnstileFailed: Bot check failed. Please complete the challenge again.
errors.invalidOtpWithAttempts: That code isn't right. {attempts} attempts left.
errors.otpExpired: This code has expired — start over to get a new one.
errors.otpMaxAttempts: Too many wrong attempts. Start over to get a new code.
errors.tokenExpired: This reset session has expired — start over from your email.
errors.passwordBreached: This password appears in a known data breach — pick a different one.

expired.title: This result has expired
expired.desc: Guest results are kept for 14 days. This one is gone — but a fresh test only takes a few minutes.

teaser.title: Someone discovered their persona!
teaser.desc: Curious what yours looks like? The test is free and takes just a few minutes.

summary.title: What your story says about you

wellbeing.title: We noticed your story carries some weight
wellbeing.desc: Whatever you're going through, you don't have to carry it alone. Talking to someone can genuinely help.

claim.title: Don't lose this version of you
claim.desc: Guest results disappear after 14 days. Save it forever with a free account — and get 3 tests every month.

quota.title: Tests this month
quota.exhausted: All used up — your quota resets at the start of next month.

trend.title: Your GRIT journey
trend.empty: Take your first test to start your GRIT journey.
trend.ariaLabel: Line chart of your GRIT scores over time

history.title: Test history
history.empty: No tests yet — your history will appear here.

locale.title: Language
locale.desc: Your emails and insights follow this preference too.

referral.title: Invite friends
referral.desc: Share your code — see how many friends joined and finished a test. (We never show you who they are.)

deletion.title: Delete account
deletion.desc: Your data gets anonymized after a 14-day grace period. You can cancel any time within those 14 days.
deletion.confirmNotice: Are you sure? After 14 days your name, email, and essays are permanently anonymized. This cannot be undone after the grace period.
deletion.pendingNotice: Deletion requested — your account will be anonymized after the 14-day grace period. You can still cancel below.

errors.alreadyRequested: A deletion request is already active.
errors.noActive: There's no active deletion request to cancel.
errors.processing: The grace period has passed — deletion is already processing and can't be cancelled.
